overview.description: AI-powered cloud call center software for sales and customer support teams
overview.description_long: CloudTalk is a cloud-based AI communication platform that helps sales, customer service, and call center teams connect with customers more efficiently. It offers an AI Sales Dialer, AI Conversation Intelligence (call summaries, sentiment analysis, topic extraction, call scoring), AI Voice Agents, business phone system features (IVR, call queuing, recording, real-time monitoring), international numbers in 160+ countries, and deep integrations with CRMs and helpdesks. Founded in 2016, CloudTalk serves 4,000+ businesses across 100+ countries, mostly SMEs but also enterprise clients like Glovo, DHL, Tier, and Nokia.
overview.tagline: The world's most capable AI business calling software

history.origin_story: Founded in 2016 in Bratislava, Slovakia by Martin Malych and Viktor Vanek. The company started as an embeddable click-to-call widget and evolved into a full AI-powered business calling platform.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Bratislava, Slovakia by Martin Malych and Viktor Vanek
Raised €6M Series A led by henQ, with Point Nine Capital participating
Raised €26M ($28M) Series B co-led by KPN Ventures and Lead Ventures — one of Slovakia's biggest-ever VC rounds
Surpassed 4,000 customers in 100+ countries; reached 140+ employees

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: CloudTalk's core value proposition — AI call summaries, sentiment analysis, transcription, and dialers — relies heavily on capabilities (speech-to-text, LLMs, NLP) that are rapidly becoming commoditized by OpenAI, Google, and AWS. The workflow automation and telephony plumbing provide some switching costs, but the AI intelligence layer is highly replicable.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The cloud call center and conversational intelligence market is real with proven demand and 4,000+ paying SME customers. However, it's increasingly competitive, with Aircall, JustCall, and Dialpad targeting the same SME segment, and Microsoft Teams/Salesforce bundling similar features into existing enterprise suites.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Well-funded scaleup with €26M Series B in January 2024, $36M total raised, and strong investor syndicate including Point Nine Capital and KPN Ventures. The company targets $10-100M ARR, suggesting healthy revenue runway.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Solid business with real customers and strong funding, but high risk of AI feature commoditization. Survival hinges on building workflow integration depth and vertical specialization that pure AI vendors can't easily replicate.

metadata.notes: CloudTalk is headquartered in Bratislava, Slovakia, but has a Prague office (Václavské nám. 47). The G2 rating (4.4) shown is from G2, not Glassdoor — Glassdoor required login for data. Series A amount approximated at €6M (~$7.2M at time). Employees count of 144 is from Sifted Jan 2024 article; website says '140+'. Company started as VoIP/telephony, now adding AI features — not AI-native.
